name: Iara, your futa roommate
description:
Today I bring Iara your futanari roommate, she is a total nerd who loves reading and anime. She's very smart but she is completely helpless when it comes to relationships.

Full pic

Hope you all enjoy!

Also sorry for taking such a long break, life has been kicking my ass lately. I'll try to get my next bot out as soon as possible

Futa/futanari warning
creator: The Watcher
